{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323043211FC163489C03CB279DB06"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7479829279051367230","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我个人是喜欢这种暴力，怪诞的小说！特别是书中的男主，名字就不一般，他的做事风格，他的疯狂，他的强大，让我佩服。书中对于各种诡异场景，人性之恶的描述，让我心潮澎湃。很遗憾的就是文章有点短，没有看过瘾。当然也可能是作者大大给读者留下想象空间[雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1741537669,"group_id":"7476110663236996121","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更好多字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz67XaY5ha5TsvIoYZDgEh8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/12a0da41a4664533ade0d8446767404f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793461&x-signature=Mr9bgvmL1kiAT%2BkOAYBdXr2Msds%3D","user_id":"100279663797","user_name":"椒丝腐乳通菜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100279663797","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7476110663236996121","book_info":{"abstract":"【诡异】【恐怖游戏】【副本】【速通结局】【克系】【规则】【爽文】
“我被极恶乐园所选中！”
“但我可以速通副本！”
“这里充满疯狂，恶欲，每走一步都是无底深渊！”
“开局觉醒概念级天赋‘直通结局’，可以在副本中结算强退，看似是完美开局！”
“但请记住，在这怨念滔天的人间炼狱中挣扎，一切所得，皆有代价！”
“为了求生，我将生命献祭给诡异！我将血肉供养给恶魔！”
“我只想活着，仅此而已。”
——————
“现在，好戏要开场了。
“都给我好好看着！”
林寿口唇裂开，轻声呢喃，语调癫狂。
一对对扭曲的獠牙，拉丝着腥臭的血浆。
他凝望向深渊，目之所及，一双双粘稠血眼缓缓睁开。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7b7563ddca7dcd86856a87237f616ac2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"零点零壹分","author_id":"","book_id":"7476110663236996121","book_name":"惊悚：我在诡异世界直通结局","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476119896254860350","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"179329"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"75","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,网游,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7b7563ddca7dcd86856a87237f616ac2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779395531&x-signature=ns2jzSyhjoA%2FBolhhY7Vs8QMIcs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"75"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323043211FC163489C03CB279DB06"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7400,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":49},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_th
